severities.label: Important
severities.description: Serious bug or weakness without immediate exploitation

releases.title: Cross-platform messaging and UX stabilization
releases.summary: Fix Linux↔macOS desktop delivery spinners, Android avatars/themes/media UX, iOS video send and presence, network hardening, and v0.2.6 release builds on khandaq.org and GitHub Releases.

changes.title: Desktop Linux↔macOS messages stuck on spinner
changes.description: Messages arrived but delivery indicators never cleared; macOS replies did not reach Linux. Outgoing traffic now uses Tox core only; toxext negotiation and receipt handling fixed.

changes.title: Android empty avatars in chat list
changes.description: Friend list showed blank circles instead of avatars or initials. Glide cache cleared before placeholders; explicit avatar dimensions applied.

changes.title: iOS crash when sending video
changes.description: Video send ran on main thread with full-file memory load. Compression and upload moved to background with size limits and error UI.

changes.title: Android text messages blocked after emoji
changes.description: After sending emoji-only messages, text sends hung with spinner in DM and groups. Message pipeline state fixed.

changes.title: Cross-platform friend request mismatch
changes.description: Desktop required manual accept while Android auto-accepted, leaving contacts stuck in pending. Auto-accept aligned on all desktop clients.

changes.title: Android dark theme unreadable chat text
changes.description: Message bubbles, timestamps, date separators and input field used dark text on dark backgrounds in night mode. Theme colors corrected.

changes.title: Android invisible toolbar icons in light theme
changes.description: Add-friend and hamburger menu used white icons on white header. Switched to DayNight ActionBar with adaptive tints.

changes.title: Network reconnection and bootstrap hardening
changes.description: Long reconnect delays after WiFi/cellular/VPN changes and weak offline startup. Bootstrap refresh, backoff with jitter, and connectivity monitors added on mobile and desktop.

changes.title: Remove Tox identicon avatars
changes.description: Generated Tox ID icons replaced with initials placeholders everywhere; profile ID badge section removed.

changes.title: Media send preview before upload
changes.description: Gallery picks sent immediately without confirmation. Preview screen with caption and cancel added on Android and iOS.

changes.title: Telegram-style online status text
changes.description: Colored debug dots replaced with readable presence strings in chat lists.

changes.title: Remove Khandaq Community auto-group
changes.description: Built-in public group entry and auto-join removed from Android client.

changes.title: Linux .deb deploy mirror 404
changes.description: Site deploy copied only unversioned .deb and picked stale 0.2.5 package. Deploy script now uploads latest .deb with versioned filename.

changes.title: Message delivery checkmarks
changes.description: Outgoing messages show sending/sent/delivered/read indicators in chats.

changes.title: Site and README download links v0.2.6
changes.description: Landing page, README, and mirror checksums updated to match GitHub Release v0.2.6.

releases.title: Security audit remediation
releases.summary: 16 vulnerabilities from the external security audit fixed in code. v0.2.5 builds for Android, iOS, Desktop, and an updated push relay.

changes.title: Android unlock crash after password
changes.description: The unlock screen silently blocked login due to isPasswordValid(). Validation now works correctly and errors are shown in the UI.

changes.title: Push token hijack via exported receiver
changes.description: Any app could replace the FCM token via broadcast. Receiver is now closed (exported=false); token is applied only from inside the app.

changes.title: IP leak via automatic OpenStreetMap tile load
changes.description: Incoming location messages automatically requested tile.openstreetmap.org. Map tiles load only after an explicit user tap.

changes.title: iOS buffer over-read in push packet
changes.description: Lossless packets without a null terminator caused over-read and crash. Strings are read via initWithBytes:length: with explicit length.

changes.title: iOS path traversal when saving files from contacts
changes.description: Filenames like ../../Library/evil could escape the downloads directory. Uses lastPathComponent and filters .. segments.

changes.title: Android IOCipherContentProvider path traversal
changes.description: A neighbouring app could read foreign files via content:// paths with ... Provider is closed; unsafe paths are rejected.

changes.title: Command injection in bootstrap scripts
changes.description: A malicious host in the registry could run arbitrary commands. Host validation added; bash -c removed; ssh uses -- separator.

changes.title: Open push wake endpoint and flood
changes.description: Anyone could send wake requests to push.khandaq.org. Rate limits added, optional HMAC auth, proper codes on FCM timeout.

changes.title: Weak Android database encryption key storage
changes.description: DB key was stored in plaintext in SharedPreferences. Skip mode uses Android Keystore; new passwords use PBKDF2 + salt.

changes.title: Weak push URL whitelist
changes.description: A contact could supply a push URL to a third-party server (ntfy.sh, etc.). Only push.khandaq.org and tox.zoff.xyz are accepted.

changes.title: Desktop hang on long markdown messages
changes.description: Messages 20k+ with unclosed ``` blocks froze the UI. Markdown limited to 16k; multiline code blocks to 8k.

changes.title: Bootstrap nodes imported without validation
changes.description: Arbitrary JSON with invalid hosts could enter the database. BootstrapHostValidator added on import.

changes.title: nginx rate limit missing on push endpoint
changes.description: Flooding push.khandaq.org was not limited at nginx level. limit_req and limit_conn added.

changes.title: Predictable nospam on registration
changes.description: nospam was generated with a weak PRNG. Replaced with SecureRandom.

changes.title: Unpinned toxcore in bootstrap Docker image
changes.description: Bootstrap build could pull an arbitrary toxcore revision. Pinned to TOXCORE_TAG=v0.2.20.

changes.title: iOS KhandaqPush incompatible with iOS 12
changes.description: CryptoKit required iOS 13+, breaking TestFlight builds. HMAC moved to CommonCrypto.
